records.question: What were our total store sales?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales FROM store_sales

records.question: What were our total store sales by item category?

trace.sql:
SELECT i.i_category, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

records.question: What are our net store sales after returns, broken down by item?

trace.sql:
SELECT 
    i.i_item_sk,
    i.i_product_name,
    i.i_brand,
    COALESCE(ss.total_sales, 0) AS gross_sales,
    COALESCE(sr.total_returns, 0) AS return_amount,
    COALESCE(ss.total_sales, 0) - COALESCE(sr.total_returns, 0) AS net_sales_after_returns
FROM item i
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_net_paid) AS total_sales
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_item_sk
) ss ON i.i_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT sr_item_sk, SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_item_sk
) sr ON i.i_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
WHERE COALESCE(ss.total_sales, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(sr.total_returns, 0) > 0
ORDER BY net_sales_after_returns DESC
LIMIT 25

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_net_paid) AS total_sales
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_item_sk
),
returns AS (
    SELECT sr_item_sk, SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_item_sk
)
SELECT 
    i.i_item_sk,
    i.i_product_name,
    i.i_brand,
    COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) AS gross_sales,
    COALESCE(r.total_returns, 0) AS return_amount,
    COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returns, 0) AS net_sales_after_returns
FROM item i
LEFT JOIN sales s ON i.i_item_sk = s.ss_item_sk
LEFT JOIN returns r ON i.i_item_sk = r.sr_item_sk
WHERE COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(r.total_returns, 0) > 0
ORDER BY net_sales_after_returns DESC
LIMIT 25

records.question: How much did customers return, in dollars, by store?

trace.sql:
sql</arg_key><arg_value>SELECT 
    s.s_store_name,
    s.s_store_id,
    SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
FROM store_returns sr
JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_store_name, s.s_store_id
ORDER BY total_return_amt DESC

SELECT s.s_store_name, SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
FROM store_returns sr
JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_store_name
ORDER BY total_return_amt DESC

records.question: What were our total store sales and total returns for each item category?

trace.sql:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(s.i_category, r.i_category) AS i_category,
    COALESCE(total_sales, 0) AS total_store_sales,
    COALESCE(total_returns, 0) AS total_store_returns
FROM (
    SELECT i.i_category, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_category
) s
FULL OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT i.i_category, SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN item i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_category
) r
ON s.i_category = r.i_category
ORDER BY i_category;

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT i.i_category, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_category
),
returns AS (
    SELECT i.i_category, SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_store_returns
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN item i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_category
)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(sales.i_category, returns.i_category) AS i_category,
    COALESCE(sales.total_store_sales, 0) AS total_store_sales,
    COALESCE(returns.total_store_returns, 0) AS total_store_returns
FROM sales
FULL OUTER JOIN returns ON sales.i_category = returns.i_category
ORDER BY i_category;

SELECT i.i_category, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY i.i_category;

SELECT i.i_category, SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_store_returns
FROM store_returns sr
JOIN item i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY i.i_category;

records.question: Which items were returned the most, compared with how many were sold?

trace.sql:
SELECT
    i.i_item_sk,
    i.i_product_name,
    COALESCE(s.sold_qty, 0)   AS sold_qty,
    COALESCE(r.returned_qty, 0) AS returned_qty,
    ROUND(COALESCE(r.returned_qty, 0) * 1.0 / NULLIF(s.sold_qty, 0) * 100, 2) AS return_rate_pct
FROM item i
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS sold_qty
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_item_sk
) s ON i.i_item_sk = s.ss_item_sk
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT sr_item_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS returned_qty
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_item_sk
) r ON i.i_item_sk = r.sr_item_sk
WHERE s.sold_qty IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY returned_qty DESC, return_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 15;

WITH sold AS (
    SELECT ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS sold_qty
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_item_sk
),
returned AS (
    SELECT sr_item_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS returned_qty
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_item_sk
)
SELECT
    i.i_item_sk,
    i.i_product_name,
    COALESCE(sold.sold_qty, 0) AS sold_qty,
    COALESCE(returned.returned_qty, 0) AS returned_qty,
    ROUND(COALESCE(returned.returned_qty, 0) * 1.0 / NULLIF(sold.sold_qty, 0) * 100, 2) AS return_rate_pct
FROM item i
JOIN sold ON i.i_item_sk = sold.ss_item_sk
LEFT JOIN returned ON i.i_item_sk = returned.sr_item_sk
ORDER BY returned_qty DESC, return_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 15;

records.question: What were our store sales in the year 2001?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2001

records.question: What is the average sales price per item?

trace.sql: SELECT AVG(ss_sales_price) AS avg_sales_price FROM store_sales

records.question: What is our net store revenue (sales minus returns) per customer?

trace.sql:
WITH sales AS (
    SELECT
        ss_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_customer_sk
),
returns AS (
    SELECT
        sr_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS num_customers,
    ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(r.total_returns, 0)), 2) AS net_revenue,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(r.total_returns, 0))) / COUNT(*),
        2
    ) AS net_revenue_per_customer
FROM sales s
FULL OUTER JOIN returns r ON s.customer_sk = r.customer_sk

records.question: How many separate item returns were recorded?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_returns FROM store_returns

records.question: What were our total store sales by state?

trace.sql:
SELECT s.s_state,
       SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

records.question: What is our total store sales revenue including tax?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(ss_net_paid_inc_tax) AS total_revenue_inc_tax FROM store_sales;

records.question: What is the total quantity of items sold and returned, per store?

trace.sql:
SELECT 
    s.s_store_sk,
    s.s_store_name,
    s.s_city,
    COALESCE(SUM(ss.ss_quantity), 0) AS total_sold_quantity,
    COALESCE(SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity), 0) AS total_returned_quantity
FROM store s
LEFT JOIN store_sales ss ON s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns sr ON s.s_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_store_sk, s.s_store_name, s.s_city
ORDER BY s.s_store_sk

WITH sold AS (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
),
returned AS (
    SELECT sr_store_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS total_returned_quantity
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    s.s_store_sk,
    s.s_store_name,
    s.s_city,
    COALESCE(sold.total_sold_quantity, 0) AS total_sold_quantity,
    COALESCE(returned.total_returned_quantity, 0) AS total_returned_quantity
FROM store s
LEFT JOIN sold ON s.s_store_sk = sold.ss_store_sk
LEFT JOIN returned ON s.s_store_sk = returned.sr_store_sk
ORDER BY s.s_store_sk

records.question: Which state had the highest return rate?

trace.sql:
WITH sales_by_state AS (
    SELECT s_state AS state, SUM(ss_quantity) AS total_sold
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    GROUP BY s_state
),
returns_by_state AS (
    SELECT s_state AS state, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS total_returned
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    GROUP BY s_state
)
SELECT r.state,
       r.total_returned,
       sa.total_sold,
       CAST(r.total_returned AS DOUBLE) / sa.total_sold AS return_rate
FROM returns_by_state r
JOIN sales_by_state sa ON r.state = sa.state
ORDER BY return_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;
